chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ طَلَّقَ وَ فَرَّقَ بَيْنَ الشُّهُودِ أَوْ طَلَّقَ بِحَضْرَةِ قَوْمٍ وَ لَمْ يَقُلْ لَهُمُ اشْهَدُوا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 11 – The one who divorces and separates between the witnesses, or divorces in the presence of a group and does not say to them, ‘Bear witness’

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/122)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/122)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ كَانَتْ لَهُ امْرَأَةٌ طَهُرَتْ مِنْ حَيْضِهَا فَجَاءَ إِلَى جَمَاعَةٍ فَقَالَ فُلَانَةُ طَالِقٌ يَقَعُ عَلَيْهَا الطَّلَاقُ وَ لَمْ يَقُلْ لَهُمُ اشْهَدُوا قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about a man for whom was a wife who was pure from her menstruation, so he went to a group, so he said, ‘So and so woman is divorced’. Does the divorce occur upon her, and he did not say to them, ‘Bear witness’?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man whose wife becomes clean of Hayd (menses) and he comes to a group of people and says, ‘So and so is ‘Taliq’ (let go, divorced)’ if divorce takes place or not but he has not asked them to bear witness. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, divorce takes place.’”
